quality.flavor_and_theme: Appropriate for an Illusion spell that negates sound.

mechanics.range_and_area: 120 feet range, 20-foot radius sphere area of effect.
mechanics.interaction_with_verbal_components: Explicitly prevents casting spells with verbal components within the area.
mechanics.damage_immunity: Grants immunity to thunder damage for objects/creatures inside.
mechanics.concentration_check_implication: As a concentration spell, maintaining the bubble requires a successful save if the caster takes damage.
